---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, integration or runtime improvement
title: "feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature request

## Summary

Describe the requested capability.

## Problem or use case

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the desired behavior and where it should live in the repository.

## Affected area

```text
[ ] runtime code
[ ] configuration/contracts
[ ] proxy/MQTT integration
[ ] fieldbus integration
[ ] installer/service
[ ] monitoring/operations
[ ] tests/tools
[ ] documentation
```

## Compatibility expectations

Explain whether the feature must preserve:

```text
- v35_1_preproduction_final_runtime command binding
- existing compiled configuration format
- existing MQTT topics
- current Modbus simulation behavior
- current test suite behavior
```

## Acceptance criteria

```text
[ ] Behavior is testable.
[ ] Configuration changes are documented.
[ ] Operational impact is documented.
[ ] Rollback path is clear.
```
